title: GET /disputes/
content:
GET /disputes/
Retrieve a list of disputes.
Parameters: id (query): ID, type (query): * `alert` - Alert, status (query): * `new` - New, order_number (query): Order Number, transaction_id (query): Transaction ID, auth_code (query): Auth Code, network_transaction_id (query): Network Transaction ID, card_type (query): Card Brand, card_first_six (query): Card First Six, card_last_four (query): Card Last Four, case_number (query): Case Number, gateway_id (query): Gateway ID, payment_method (query): Payment Method, resolution (query): * `could_not_find_order` - Transaction Not found, dispute_date_from (query): YYYY-MM-DD, dispute_date_to (query): YYYY-MM-DD, cursor (query): The pagination cursor value.

title: POST /disputes/
content:
POST /disputes/
Create a new dispute.
Request fields: amount, arn, case_number, currency, date_created, happened_at, id, metadata, order, report_amount, report_currency, resolution: * `could_not_find_order` - Transaction Not found, resolution_other_message, status: * `new` - New, transaction, type: * `alert` - Alert

content:

content:

Autocomplete address suggestions based on partial input.
Parameters: country (query): Optional country code to filter results., language (query): Optional language code for the results., query_text (query): Partial address input to search for suggestions.

title: GET /api/v1/campaigns/
content:
GET /api/v1/campaigns/
Retrieve campaign details.

title: POST /api/v1/carts/
content:
POST /api/v1/carts/
Create a new cart.
Request fields: address: Set default shipping and billing address for the user, attribution, currency: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP), defaults to the campaign currency , lines: Array of package IDs, user, vouchers: Campaign offer codes or store coupon code

title: POST /api/v1/carts/calculate/
content:
POST /api/v1/carts/calculate/
Calculate cart summary.
Request fields: currency: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP), defaults to the campaign currency , lines: Array of package IDs, shipping_method: Selected shipping method ID, vouchers: Campaign offer codes or store coupon code

title: POST /api/v1/orders/
content:
POST /api/v1/orders/
Create a new order.
Request fields: attribution, billing_address, billing_same_as_shipping_address: Use the shipping address as the billing address, currency: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP), defaults to the campaign currency , lines: Array of package IDs, payment_detail, payment_failed_url: Redirect user to this url if payment is unsuccessful, shipping_address, shipping_method: Shipping method ID for order shipping, success_url: Fully qualified url that payment redirect flows will redirect to, use_default_billing_address: Use the customer's default billing address for this order, use_default_shipping_address: Use the customer's default shipping address for this order, user, vouchers: Campaign offer codes or store coupon code

title: GET /api/v1/orders/{ref_id}/
content:
GET /api/v1/orders/{ref_id}/
Retrieve specific order details.
Parameters: ref_id (path): Order reference ID

title: POST /api/v1/orders/{ref_id}/upsells/
description: Add an upsell to an existing order.
content:
POST /api/v1/orders/{ref_id}/upsells/
Add an upsell to an existing order.
Parameters: ref_id (path): Order reference ID
Request fields: lines: Array of package IDs, payment_detail, vouchers: Array of voucher codes
